reported_delivery_components: Today, I'm excited to announce that we are meeting that demand by creating a dedicated AWS Forward Deployed Engineering (FDE) organization. Backed by a $1 billion investment, the AWS FDE model is different in three key ways: it is agentic-first, it compresses timelines from months to days, and it is designed so customers are self-sufficient when a deployment ends.
Getting started with AWS Forward Deployed Engineering

use_case: engineers to build your Voice AI Agents
reported_delivery_components: Our expert Forward Deployment Engineers work side-by-side with your team to build, integrate, and deploy your custom Voice AI agents. Skip the technical complexity—we handle everything!
Everything we build goes live. From sandbox testing to full production deployment with monitoring, security, and proper routing configurations.

Forward Deployed Engineering (FDE) is a professional services offering from Telnyx where our expert engineers work directly with your team to build, integrate, and deploy Voice AI agent solutions . Unlike traditional support, FDE engineers embed with you from pre-sale proof-of-concept through production deployment, acting as an extension of your team to accelerate time-to-value and de-risk adoption.
